name: Gulf Snapper with Avocado and Tomatillo Salsa
recipeIngredient: 5 Tomatillos, husks removed and coarsely chopped
1/4 White Onion, peeled and roughly chopped
2 Serrano or Jalapeno Chilies, stemmed, seeded, and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatillos, onion, garlic, chilies, water, and vinegar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for about 15 minutes.
2. Transfer solid ingredients (tomatillos, onion, garlic, chilies) to a blender.
3. Add avocado, chopped cilantro, lime juice, and 1 tbsp of the cooking liquid. Blend just until smooth, adding additional cooking liquid if necessary.
4. Return blended mixture to the saucepan. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Heat through just before serving.
6. Sprinkle snapper fillets with oregano, salt, and pepper.
7. Lightly coat a non-stick skillet with vegetable spray.
8. Saute fish over medium-high heat until cooked but not falling apart, about 4 minutes on each side.
9. Spoon a puddle of salsa onto 4 dinner plates and place the snapper on top of the sauce.
10. Arrange lime wedges around or on top of the fish; garnish with sprigs of cilantro and serve.
